zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Betteshorne於1353年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東時，她的父親John de Betteshorne34歲，母親Lady Elizabeth De Gournali25歲。她於1371年與Sir John Berkeley在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年67歲，埋葬在英國素可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Betteshorne于1353年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東时，她的父亲John de Betteshorne34岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth De Gournali25岁。她于1371年与Sir John Berkeley在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1420年在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年67岁，埋葬在英国素可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Betteshorne was born in 1353, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, her father, John de Betteshorne, was 34 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth De Gournali, was 25. She married Sir John Berkeley in 1371, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1420, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Betteshorne est née en 1353, à Beverston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, John de Betteshorne, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth De Gournali, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Berkeley en 1371, à Beverston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1420, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Betteshorne 1353 in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Betteshorne 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth De Gournali 25. Sie hat 1371 in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1420 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Betteshorne è nata il nel 1353 nel Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, John de Betteshorne, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth De Gournali, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Berkeley nel 1371, nel Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1420, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Betteshorneが1353年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンで生まれた時，父John de Betteshorneは34歳，母Lady Elizabeth De Gournaliは25歳であった。1371年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンでSir John Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1420年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで67歳で死去し，イギリススセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Betteshorne(이)가 1353년 영국 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Betteshorne(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth De Gournali(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1371년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 Sir John Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Betteshorne nasceu em 1353, em Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Betteshorne, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth De Gournali, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Berkeley em 1371, em Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1420, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Betteshorne родилась в 1353 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Betteshorne было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth De Gournali, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Berkeley в 1371 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Betteshorne nació en 1353, en Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Betteshorne, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth De Gournali, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir John Berkeley en 1371, en Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1420, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Sussex, Inglaterra.
